methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the collected data, including comparison of differences between groups and analysis of lymphocyte proliferation responses.

steps.description: For statistical analyses, GraphPad Prism 6 software (GraphPad Software, La Jolla, Calif) was used.
steps.searchable_summary: use GraphPad Prism 6 for statistical analysis

steps.description: Differences between groups were compared by using the Wilcoxon signed-rank test.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Wilcoxon signed-rank test to compare group differences

steps.description: Lymphocyte proliferation responses after subtraction of medium background are shown as counts per minute (y-axis).
Induction of grass pollen allergen-specific IgG responses in rabbits by means of immunization with BM32, recombinant grass pollen allergens, and natural grass pollen AIT extracts.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze IgG response induction in rabbits

steps.description: Inhibition of IgE binding in allergic patients to grass pollen allergens with rabbit antibodies induced by vaccination.
